description_long: This is a traditional windmill with a tall, rectangular tower structure set on a square grassy base, featuring four large lattice-style blades attached to a central hub. The tower is painted in a muted blue-gray color with white and red accents, and it has a sloped roof at the top. The base is landscaped with a path leading up to the windmill and small posts or stones marking the perimeter. At the rear, mechanical linkages and a wheel are visible, likely for adjusting the orientation of the blades. The windows and doors are minimal, with a small entryway at the front. The overall appearance is reminiscent of classic European windmills commonly found in rural or park settings.
description: A classic blue-gray windmill with four lattice blades, set on a grassy square base with a path and mechanical rear components.
description_view_0: Front view showing the four large blades, central hub, and the main entry path leading to the windmill.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tall, rectangular tower and the depth of the sloped roof, with the blades seen edge-on.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the mechanical linkages, wheel, and the back of the tower with red and white accents.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the tower's profile and the rear mechanical assembly, with the path curving around the base.
